name: JOHNSON & JOHNSON
summary: Johnson & Johnson is a global healthcare holding company with approximately 138,200 employees operating in virtually all countries. It is organized into two segments: Innovative Medicine (pharmaceuticals across oncology, immunology, neuroscience, pulmonary hypertension, infectious diseases, and cardiovascular/metabolism) and MedTech (cardiovascular, orthopaedics, surgery, and vision products). Key products include DARZALEX, STELARA, TREMFYA, CARVYKTI, SPRAVATO, XARELTO, and ACUVUE contact lenses.

products.name: DARZALEX / DARZALEX FASPRO (daratumumab)
products.description: Treatment for multiple myeloma and light chain AL Amyloidosis; largest product at ~15% of total revenues.

products.name: STELARA (ustekinumab)
products.description: Treatment for plaque psoriasis, psoriatic arthritis, Crohn's disease, and ulcerative colitis; second largest product at ~6.5% of revenues.

products.name: TREMFYA (guselkumab)
products.description: Treatment for plaque psoriasis, psoriatic arthritis, Crohn's disease, and ulcerative colitis; third largest product at ~5.5% of revenues.

products.name: CARVYKTI (ciltacabtagene autoleucel)
products.description: CAR-T-cell therapy for relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma.

products.name: ERLEADA (apalutamide)
products.description: Next-generation androgen receptor inhibitor for prostate cancer treatment.

products.name: IMBRUVICA (ibrutinib)
products.description: Treatment for B-cell malignancies and chronic graft versus host disease.

products.name: RYBREVANT (amivantamab)
products.description: Bispecific antibody for EGFR-mutated non-small cell lung cancer in adults.

products.name: LAZCLUZE (lazertinib)
products.description: Oral, brain-penetrant EGFR tyrosine kinase inhibitor for non-small cell lung cancer.

products.name: TALVEY (talquetamab-tgvs)
products.description: Bispecific antibody for relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma after four prior lines of therapy.

products.name: TECVAYLI (teclistamab-cqyv)
products.description: Bispecific antibody for relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma after four prior lines of therapy.

products.name: ZYTIGA (abiraterone acetate)
products.description: Treatment for prostate cancer.

products.name: REMICADE (infliximab)
products.description: Treatment for immune-mediated inflammatory diseases.

products.name: SIMPONI / SIMPONI ARIA (golimumab)
products.description: Subcutaneous and intravenous treatments for rheumatoid arthritis, psoriatic arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, and ulcerative colitis.

products.name: CAPLYTA (lumateperone)
products.description: Treatment for major depressive disorder, bipolar depression, and schizophrenia in adults.

products.name: CONCERTA (methylphenidate HCl)
products.description: Extended-release treatment for attention deficit hyperactivity disorder.

products.name: INVEGA SUSTENNA / XEPLION (paliperidone palmitate)
products.description: Treatment for schizophrenia and schizoaffective disorder in adults.

products.name: INVEGA TRINZA / TREVICTA (paliperidone palmitate)
products.description: Treatment for schizophrenia in patients previously treated with INVEGA SUSTENNA.

products.name: SPRAVATO (esketamine)
products.description: Nasal spray for treatment-resistant depression and MDD with suicidal ideation in adults.

products.name: EDURANT (rilpivirine)
products.description: Antiretroviral medicine for HIV treatment in combination with other antiretrovirals.

products.name: PREZISTA (darunavir)
products.description: Antiretroviral medicine for HIV treatment.

products.name: PREZCOBIX / REZOLSTA (darunavir/cobicistat)
products.description: Antiretroviral combination medicine for HIV treatment.

products.name: SYMTUZA (darunavir/cobicistat/emtricitabine/tenofovir alafenamide)
products.description: Once-daily single tablet regimen for HIV treatment.

products.name: OPSUMIT (macitentan) / OPSYNVI (macitentan/tadalafil)
products.description: Long-term treatment for pulmonary arterial hypertension.

products.name: UPTRAVI (selexipag)
products.description: Oral and intravenous selective IP receptor agonist for pulmonary arterial hypertension.

products.name: XARELTO (rivaroxaban)
products.description: Oral anticoagulant for DVT, PE prevention, stroke reduction, and cardiovascular events.

products.name: ACUVUE
products.description: Brand of contact lenses sold through eye care professionals globally.

products.name: TECNIS
products.description: Premium intraocular lenses for cataract surgery.

products.name: Abiomed
products.description: Mechanical circulatory support technologies for cardiogenic shock and high-risk PCI procedures.

products.name: Shockwave
products.description: Circulatory restoration products for calcified coronary artery disease and peripheral artery disease.

products.name: Mentor
products.description: Solutions for breast aesthetics and reconstruction within the Surgery portfolio.

partnerships.description: Exclusive license to two DARZALEX patent families; royalty rate 12%-20% of net sales, ~$2.4B paid in fiscal 2025.
